movie.title: Scary Movie 2 (2001) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & ENG] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: While the original parodied slasher flicks like Scream, Keenen Ivory Wayans’s sequel to Scary Movie takes comedic aim at haunted house movies. A group of students visit a mansion called “Hell House,” and murderous high jinks ensue.
